blockers.description: Vercel builds fail on cloud but succeed locally. New Goodwood-inspired design and UI changes cannot be deployed.
blockers.workaround: Site reverted to last working deployment (commit 28433bd). New design changes exist locally but cannot be pushed.

blockers.description: Admin route causes build failures - Module not found for payload.config at runtime
blockers.workaround: Admin route was removed from build. CMS cannot be accessed.

human_actions_pending.action: Debug Vercel build failure - builds work locally but fail on Vercel
human_actions_pending.context: The new Goodwood-inspired design and user UI updates are ready locally but cannot be deployed

human_actions_pending.action: Access Payload CMS admin to manage properties
human_actions_pending.context: Admin route was removed to get frontend working. Need alternative way to manage properties.

decisions.decision: Reverted to working deployment to restore site availability
decisions.rationale: Builds failing meant no deployment was possible. User needed a working site.

decisions.decision: Removed Payload admin route to simplify build
decisions.rationale: Admin route with dynamic imports was causing module resolution errors on Vercel

next_action: Debug Vercel build issue. Build succeeds locally but fails on Vercel with no clear error. Try: 1) Compare local vs Vercel dependency versions, 2) Use Vercel CLI to deploy locally, 3) Check Node version differences (local 24.x, Vercel 24.x)
context_notes: Session focused on deploying new Goodwood-inspired luxury design (charcoal/ivory/gold color scheme, Playfair Display typography). Design changes work locally but Vercel builds keep failing. Site currently live with OLD design. User is frustrated with repeated deployment issues.
